Chico de la entrega de periodicos en verano: un verdadero reto

Thanks to you, the combat logs are complete.
Now we need to put together a
training manual, but...
I don’t even know what goes into a “manual”!
How am I supposed to write one?!
I know it’s lame,
but could you ask around for me? Thanks!

[Talk] to Risa, Quna, and Stratos
in the ARKS Lobby
